core_philosophy: Soft premium utility. Focus on clear typography, thumb-friendly ergonomics, satisfying tactile interactions, and immediate visual feedback.

scale.display_main: text-6xl sm:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight leading-none text-right
scale.display_equation: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-mono text-muted-foreground text-right mb-2

layout_and_spacing.container: flex flex-col h-full w-full bg-background text-text_primary p-4 sm:p-6
layout_and_spacing.display_area: flex-1 flex flex-col justify-end pb-8 min-h-[30vh]
layout_and_spacing.controls_area: flex justify-between items-center py-4 mb-4 border-b border-border/30
layout_and_spacing.history_panel: absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-[65vh] bg-surface/95 backdrop-blur-2xl rounded-b-3xl shadow-2xl p-6 z-50 overflow-y-auto border-b border-border/50

buttons.base: flex items-center justify-center rounded-full aspect-square touch-manipulation
buttons.haptic_feedback: Require haptic feedback trigger on press (use Expo Haptics)

toggles.container: flex p-1 bg-surface rounded-full border border-border/50 shadow-inner

language_toggle.implementation: Use a global state. Create a utility function `translateNumbers(val, lang)` that maps digits during render for the display and button labels.

mode_toggle.implementation: Animate the height/opacity of the scientific keypad container using LayoutAnimation or Reanimated when toggled. When scientific is active, it stacks above the basic grid.

history_panel.implementation: Render previous calculations. Tapping a history item sets the current main display to that result.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='btn-num-1', data-testid='btn-op-add', data-testid='display-main', data-testid='toggle-lang', data-testid='toggle-theme', data-testid='history-item-0'

icons.usage: Use icons for history, backspace, theme toggle (sun/moon), and basic operations if needed (divide, multiply, minus, plus, equals).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind (Tailwind for RN) following the Tailwind class guidelines provided.
Ensure safe area insets are respected for top (status bar) and bottom (home indicator) using react-native-safe-area-context.
Implement tactile button feedback using react-native haptics (impactAsync) and React Native Reanimated or Pressable animated styles.
Ensure text scaling is limited so huge numbers do not break the display area; use adjustsFontSizeToFit on the main Text component.
Follow the exact Bengali numeral mappings: 0=০, 1=১, 2=২, 3=৩, 4=৪, 5=৫, 6=৬, 7=৭, 8=৮, 9=৯.
